claim: The framework shall not include illustrative example graph content in its source modules, keeping worked examples in domain graph.json files that are the user's own content.
why: Atom of R-content-free-framework (no-examples concern). D1 split decided by domain-user 2026-06-30. WHY: example data in source drifts from the user's real content and misleads adopters into thinking it is real content. This holds by construction: all business content lives in domains/<name>/graph.json loaded by internal/loader at runtime, never compiled into the framework source.
